title: The CIA Triad and Threat Mitigation
description: A visual representation of the core principles of information security (CIA Triad) and the common security controls or threats associated with each.
relationships: The CIA Triad forms the core objectives. Threats (like unauthorized access, data tampering, denial-of-service) target these objectives. Security Controls (like encryption, hashing, backups) are implemented to protect the objectives from the threats.
